accuracy.rationale: All 19 FRs accurately trace to user's 16 regras + 3 fixes. Line numbers and file paths verified against codebase analysis. SKU strategy (AC-9 precedent) correctly identified. Portal escolar isolation confirmed via RES-004. Migration strategy aligns with existing pattern (001-013). Minor: FR-012 (bipagem mobile) references 'existing barcode infra' but specific implementation details could be more precise.

issues.description: FR-012: barcode scanning implementation details (which API, which library) not specified
issues.recommendation: Acceptable — existing gdp-estoque-intel-mobile.html already has the pattern

completeness.rationale: All 16 user regras covered. 3 Radar fixes covered. Migration plan included. Traceability matrix complete. Wave breakdown logical. Two gaps identified.

issues.description: Data migration strategy for existing contratos: existing items with 'sku' field need migration to 'produto_vinculado_id'. Spec mentions removal but doesn't detail how existing data is transformed.
issues.recommendation: Add data migration step in Wave 2: for each contrato item with skuVinculado, lookup produto by SKU and set produto_vinculado_id. Items without skuVinculado get null (user fills later).

issues.description: Rollback strategy mentioned (feature flags, _disabled/) but not formalized per wave.
issues.recommendation: Acceptable for this scope — wave-based deployment is inherently rollback-friendly.

consistency.rationale: No contradictions between FRs. Wave ordering respects dependency chain (FR-004→FR-005→FR-006, FR-008→FR-007, etc.). Constitutional Gate properly applied — no invented features. NFRs and CONs consistently enforced throughout. Menu reorganization (FR-016) aligns with module changes in other FRs.

feasibility.rationale: All changes validated as technically feasible (RES-*). No new libraries needed. Vercel function limit respected. Supabase migration is additive. Biggest risk: 152 demanda references removal (FR-008). Wave-based approach mitigates risk.

issues.description: FR-008 (remove demanda): 152 references is a significant amount of code to modify in one wave. Risk of missing a reference causing runtime errors.
issues.recommendation: Consider splitting FR-008 into sub-tasks: (a) remove UI references, (b) remove data layer, (c) remove sync/storage. Test each sub-task independently.

alignment.rationale: Spec directly implements user's stated objective: 'Reduzir complexidade do sistema ERP atual'. All 16 regras mapped 1:1 to FRs. Constraints (NAO criar projeto novo, NAO substituir layout, NAO quebrar funcionalidades, NAO remover portal escolar) explicitly enforced via CON-001 to CON-004. Fluxo final matches user's diagram: Contrato → Portal → Pedidos → NF.

strengths: Complete 1:1 mapping of user's 16 regras to FRs
Excellent traceability — every spec statement traces to FR/NFR/CON/RES
Portal escolar safety confirmed via research
Constitutional Gate properly applied — no invented features
weaknesses: Data migration for existing contrato items needs more detail
FR-008 (demanda removal) is high-risk due to 152 references — needs sub-task breakdown
FR-012 (bipagem mobile) barcode implementation slightly underspecified
recommendations: Add data migration step for existing contrato→produto linkage in Wave 2 plan
Break FR-008 into 3 sub-tasks for safer execution
